title: Introduce Yourself
prompt: Introduce yourself by stating your name, age, and grade.
hint: Use simple sentences like 'My name is...', 'I am ... years old', and 'I am in grade ...'.
sample: My name is Rowan. I am ten years old. I am in grade five.

ja.prompt: 名前、年齢、学年を述べて自己紹介してください。
ja.hint: 'My name is...', 'I am ... years old', 'I am in grade ...' のような簡単な文を使いましょう。
ja.sample: My name is Rowan. I am ten years old. I am in grade five.

zh.prompt: 介紹你自己，說出你的名字、年齡和年級。
zh.hint: 使用簡單句子，如 'My name is...'，'I am ... years old'，和 'I am in grade ...'。
zh.sample: My name is Rowan. I am ten years old. I am in grade five.

title: Talk About Your School Life
prompt: Describe what you like about school and your favorite subject.
hint: Explain why you like school and your favorite subject using sentences like 'I love coming to school because...' and 'My favorite subject is... because...'.
sample: I love coming to school because I learn new things and meet my friends. My favorite subject is English because I enjoy reading and writing.

ja.prompt: 学校の好きなところと好きな教科について話してください。
ja.hint: 'I love coming to school because...' や 'My favorite subject is... because...' のような文で理由を説明しましょう。
ja.sample: I love coming to school because I learn new things and meet my friends. My favorite subject is English because I enjoy reading and writing.

zh.prompt: 描述你喜歡學校的什麼，以及你最喜歡的科目。
zh.hint: 用句子說明你為什麼喜歡學校和你最喜歡的科目，如 'I love coming to school because...' 和 'My favorite subject is... because...'。
zh.sample: I love coming to school because I learn new things and meet my friends. My favorite subject is English because I enjoy reading and writing.

title: Daily School Routine
prompt: Explain how you come to school and what you do during recess.
hint: Use sentences like 'I come to school by...' and 'During recess, I...'.
sample: I come to school by bus. During recess, I eat snacks and play with my friends.

ja.prompt: 学校への通学方法と休み時間に何をするか説明してください。
ja.hint: 'I come to school by...' と 'During recess, I...' のような文を使いましょう。
ja.sample: I come to school by bus. During recess, I eat snacks and play with my friends.

zh.prompt: 說明你如何去學校以及課間休息時你做什麼。
zh.hint: 使用句子如 'I come to school by...' 和 'During recess, I...'。
zh.sample: I come to school by bus. During recess, I eat snacks and play with my friends.

title: Answering Questions in Class
prompt: Practice asking and answering questions about understanding the lesson.
hint: Use questions like 'Did you understand the topic?' and answers like 'Yes, I understood it.' or 'No, please explain again.'
sample:
Teacher: Did you understand the topic?
Student: Yes, I understood it.
Teacher: Can you explain it to the class?
Student: Yes, I will try.

ja.prompt: 授業の理解について質問し、答える練習をしてください。
ja.hint: 'Did you understand the topic?' のような質問と 'Yes, I understood it.' や 'No, please explain again.' のような答えを使いましょう。
ja.sample:
Teacher: Did you understand the topic?
Student: Yes, I understood it.
Teacher: Can you explain it to the class?
Student: Yes, I will try.

zh.prompt: 練習問答關於是否理解課程的問題。
zh.hint: 使用問題如 'Did you understand the topic?' 和回答如 'Yes, I understood it.' 或 'No, please explain again.'。
zh.sample:
Teacher: Did you understand the topic?
Student: Yes, I understood it.
Teacher: Can you explain it to the class?
Student: Yes, I will try.

title: Talking About Hobbies and Clubs
prompt: Describe your hobbies and any clubs you have joined at school.
hint: Use sentences like 'I like...', 'I joined the...', and explain why you enjoy them.
sample: I like drawing and playing cricket. I joined the science club because I love learning about plants and animals.

ja.prompt: 趣味や学校で参加しているクラブについて説明してください。
ja.hint: 'I like...', 'I joined the...' のような文を使い、なぜそれが好きか説明しましょう。
ja.sample: I like drawing and playing cricket. I joined the science club because I love learning about plants and animals.

zh.prompt: 描述你的興趣和你加入的學校社團。
zh.hint: 使用句子如 'I like...'，'I joined the...'，並解釋你為什麼喜歡它們。
zh.sample: I like drawing and playing cricket. I joined the science club because I love learning about plants and animals.

title: Expressing Feelings and Apologies
prompt: Practice expressing feelings and apologizing in class situations.
hint: Use sentences like 'I'm sorry, I was feeling sleepy.' or 'I should say sorry when I make a mistake.'
sample:
Teacher: Why are you not paying attention?
Student: I'm sorry, I was feeling sleepy.
Teacher: What should you say when you make a mistake?
Student: I should say sorry.

ja.prompt: 授業中の感情表現や謝罪の練習をしてください。
ja.hint: 'I'm sorry, I was feeling sleepy.' や 'I should say sorry when I make a mistake.' のような文を使いましょう。
ja.sample:
Teacher: Why are you not paying attention?
Student: I'm sorry, I was feeling sleepy.
Teacher: What should you say when you make a mistake?
Student: I should say sorry.

zh.prompt: 練習在課堂情境中表達感受和道歉。
zh.hint: 使用句子如 'I'm sorry, I was feeling sleepy.' 或 'I should say sorry when I make a mistake.'。
zh.sample:
Teacher: Why are you not paying attention?
Student: I'm sorry, I was feeling sleepy.
Teacher: What should you say when you make a mistake?
Student: I should say sorry.

title: School Rules and Politeness
prompt: Explain why it is important to follow school rules and be polite.
hint: Use sentences like 'I always follow school rules because...' and 'Being polite shows respect.'
sample: I always follow school rules because they keep us safe. Being polite shows respect to others.

ja.prompt: 学校のルールを守り、礼儀正しくすることがなぜ大切か説明してください。
ja.hint: 'I always follow school rules because...' や 'Being polite shows respect.' のような文を使いましょう。
ja.sample: I always follow school rules because they keep us safe. Being polite shows respect to others.

zh.prompt: 說明為什麼遵守校規和有禮貌很重要。
zh.hint: 使用句子如 'I always follow school rules because...' 和 'Being polite shows respect.'。
zh.sample: I always follow school rules because they keep us safe. Being polite shows respect to others.

title: Asking Permission in Class
prompt: Practice asking for permission politely in class.
hint: Use phrases like 'May I...' and responses like 'Yes, you may.' or 'No, not now.'
sample:
Student: May I go to the washroom?
Teacher: Yes, but come back quickly.
Student: May I borrow a pencil?
Teacher: Yes, ask your classmate.

ja.prompt: 授業中に丁寧に許可を求める練習をしてください。
ja.hint: 'May I...' のようなフレーズと 'Yes, you may.' や 'No, not now.' のような返答を使いましょう。
ja.sample:
Student: May I go to the washroom?
Teacher: Yes, but come back quickly.
Student: May I borrow a pencil?
Teacher: Yes, ask your classmate.

zh.prompt: 練習在課堂上禮貌地請求許可。
zh.hint: 使用 'May I...' 這類片語和 'Yes, you may.' 或 'No, not now.' 這類回答。
zh.sample:
Student: May I go to the washroom?
Teacher: Yes, but come back quickly.
Student: May I borrow a pencil?
Teacher: Yes, ask your classmate.

title: Talking About Future Dreams and Goals
prompt: Describe your future dreams and what motivates you to study.
hint: Use sentences like 'I want to become...', 'My biggest dream is...', and 'I study because...'.
sample: I want to become a doctor because I want to help people. My biggest dream is to make my parents proud. I study because of my dream and my teachers' encouragement.

ja.prompt: 将来の夢や勉強の動機について話してください。
ja.hint: 'I want to become...', 'My biggest dream is...', 'I study because...' のような文を使いましょう。
ja.sample: I want to become a doctor because I want to help people. My biggest dream is to make my parents proud. I study because of my dream and my teachers' encouragement.

zh.prompt: 描述你的未來夢想和學習動機。
zh.hint: 使用句子如 'I want to become...'，'My biggest dream is...'，和 'I study because...'。
zh.sample: I want to become a doctor because I want to help people. My biggest dream is to make my parents proud. I study because of my dream and my teachers' encouragement.
